ItacPersonItem.Notes: He was born in Ferrara, his mother`s favourite holyday city. Carlo Cibo was also member of the Oscuri Academy in Lucca, and other academies in Genoa. See his biography by Nicola Longo, in DBI. Here is reproduced what appears to be his emblem, inside his publication Degli ardori... .
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
